name: AWS CodeBuild Project Updated
description: This model detects the use of the UpdateProject API call in AWS CodeBuild, which indicates a modification to a build project’s configuration. Changes to critical settings such as the buildspec, environment image, service role, or environment variables can alter how and with what permissions build jobs execute. Monitoring this activity is important because unauthorized or unexpected project updates may allow adversaries to persist malicious code execution, escalate privileges, or tamper with CI/CD pipelines.
author: Srivathsa H S
